title: Death Collection
description: Are You Ready to Collect all the death ! Good Luck !
body:
# **DEATH COLLECTION**



### This datapack offers you the opportunity to complete 45 new advancements !


How can I complete this task ? 

It's simple: when you die to a mob, you unlock a new advancement.

The final goal is to experience every possible death caused by a mob in the game

![Example of the advancements page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c9f2c6f9ac600a4e2e58420a1f09df1e80d573e.png)

### Reward

When you finished any achivements, you earn a special reward ! 
Go to your death location for the reward...

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A head of mob that kill you !

</details>

### This datapack has special functions

This datapack allows you to summon two mobs that do not naturally spawn in the world.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

"Illusioner" and "The Killer Rabbit" 

</details>

Then if you want to upgrade your survival adventure, with new fun advancement... Download this datapack !




_So...Are You Ready to Collect all the death !_ 
## Good Luck !
